summary: REQ-32 is largely implemented: LocationSection.tsx was updated with a new Google Maps iframe URL pointing to coordinates 32.8963, 74.7407 (Akhnoor Palace area), and the 'Get Directions' button retains the correct link. However, the iframe URL uses the maps.google.com/maps?output=embed variant rather than the preferred /maps/embed? format, which may raise concerns about URL validity per the acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: The iframe uses a valid Google Maps embed URL (using /maps/embed? format) that loads correctly without errors.
missing_requirements.reason: The implemented iframe src uses 'https://maps.google.com/maps?q=32.8963,74.7407&t=&z=17&ie=UTF8&iwloc=&output=embed' — the older maps.google.com/maps?output=embed pattern — rather than the explicitly required /maps/embed? format (e.g., https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=... or https://www.google.com/maps/embed?q=...). The acceptance criteria specifically require the /maps/embed? format.
